title: Avocado Sambhar
description: A creamy and flavorful take on traditional Indian sambhar, incorporating ripe avocado for added richness.

ingredients.name: Mixed vegetables (such as bean sprouts, peas, and cauliflower)

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened.
Add the chopped carrot and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the mixed vegetables and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the sambhar powder and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tomato puree and water, and stir well.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 10-15 minutes.
Stir in the diced avocado and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Serve the sambhar over rice, if desired, and garnish with a dollop of ghee or oil, if desired.
